title: Infra
description: Compact Marin infrastructure cockpit: nightly regressions, main CI, ferries, Iris capacity, provisioning, Kubernetes control plane, and hero training.

params.value: WITH recent AS (SELECT labels, value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY labels ORDER BY collected_at DESC) AS rn FROM "infra.canary.metrics" WHERE metric = 'probe_up' AND collected_at >= {{from}} AND collected_at < {{to}}) SELECT value FROM recent WHERE rn = 1

SELECT collected_at AS t, value, labels FROM "infra.canary.metrics" WHERE metric = 'worker_healthy' AND contains(labels, '"region"') AND collected_at >= {{from}} AND collected_at < {{to}} ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at AS t, value FROM "infra.canary.metrics" WHERE metric = 'provision_success_ratio' AND contains(labels, '"scope": "fleet"') AND collected_at >= {{from}} AND collected_at < {{to}} ORDER BY collected_at

WITH recent AS (SELECT labels, metric, value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY labels, metric ORDER BY collected_at DESC) AS rn FROM "infra.canary.metrics" WHERE metric IN ('probe_up', 'probe_latency_ms') AND collected_at >= {{from}} AND collected_at < {{to}}) SELECT json_get(labels, 'probe') AS probe, metric, value FROM recent WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY probe, metric
SELECT collected_at AS t, value, labels FROM "infra.canary.metrics" WHERE metric = 'probe_latency_ms' AND collected_at >= {{from}} AND collected_at < {{to}} ORDER BY collected_at
